title: IT Position Transfer from Parks to Information Technology Department
summary: Budget transfer moves an IT position from Parks Department to IT Department so the role can support citywide technology needs rather than parks-specific work. Remaining salary funds transfer with the position. Budget Director Evan Loving presents.
